overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a cowboy hat and long coat walking through a rainy, gas-lit historic city street at night. The character moves along wet cobblestone sidewalks past brick buildings with painted advertisements, horse-drawn carriages, and the Columbia Street Station.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city sidewalk with painted brick warehouse building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone sidewalk beside a brick building with large painted advertisements for ladies' wear

entered.detail: red brick industrial building with large white painted advertisement reading 'LADIES & MISSES' and 'THE CHOICEST WEAR'
cast iron street lamp with warm yellow glowing light
wooden slatted bench positioned against the building wall
rain-slicked cobblestone pavement reflecting the gas lamp light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked cobblestone sidewalk beside a historic brick building featuring large painted advertisements. Gas lamps cast warm light onto the wet pavement, creating reflective surfaces. The street is empty of pedestrians, with only the sound of rain and footsteps.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with building overhangs

events.description: moves under building awning, becoming partially sheltered from the rain

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk under covered awnings, glancing toward horse carriages across the street

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the cobblestone street in the distance

entered.detail: wooden and metal awning extending from the building providing shelter from rain
lower facade of building constructed from cut stone blocks
wooden carriage with horses visible across the wet street

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the protective awning of the building, transitioning from exposed rain to a semi-covered walkway. The stone base of the building becomes visible, and horse-drawn carriages can be seen moving along the street to the left. The lighting becomes a mix of direct gas lamps and shadowed areas under the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic train station entrance with carriage parking

events.description: approaches the illuminated entrance of Columbia Street Station

agents.ego_description: walking past the station entrance while observing the parked horse carriages and illuminated platform

entered.detail: large wooden train station building with extended platform roof and illuminated windows
red sign with white text reading 'COLUMBIA STREET STATION' mounted on the building facade
street featuring embedded railway tracks for streetcars or trains

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway and approaches the Columbia Street Station, a prominent wooden building with a large red sign. Horse-drawn carriages are parked along the street near the station entrance. The cobblestone street features embedded railway tracks, and the area is illuminated by overhead street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with opera house signage and carriage parking

events.description: character navigates around a horse carriage parked on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, maneuvering around a stationary horse carriage near the opera house entrance

notable_agents.action: white horse hitched to carriage standing stationary on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green circular sign reading 'SAINT DENIS OPERA HOUSE' mounted on a post
ornate brick building front with decorative wooden doors and wall-mounted lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the Columbia Street Station and approaches a street corner marked by a sign for the Saint Denis Opera House. A white horse hitched to a carriage stands on the sidewalk, requiring the character to navigate around it. The buildings feature ornate architectural details with warm lantern light illuminating the wet cobblestones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked historic city at night, transitioning from a quiet side street to a bustling urban corner. It begins with the character walking along a rain-soaked cobblestone sidewalk beside a brick building adorned with large painted advertisements, where gas lamps create shimmering reflections on the wet pavement. As the character moves under a protective awning, the scene shifts from the open rain to a semi-covered walkway, revealing horse-drawn carriages passing by in the street. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the shelter and approach the wooden Columbia Street Station, where embedded railway tracks cut through the cobblestones under the glow of overhead lamps. Finally, the movement continues past the station toward a street corner marked by the Saint Denis Opera House, navigating around a hitched white horse amidst ornate architecture and warm lantern light.
